name: Longer ragne kilier
description: The Longer ragne kilier is a Bandit shotgun that can roll very high damage and fire rate, especially when paired with a Hyperion barrel that tightens the spread dramatically. That narrower pattern gives it much better mid-range performance than most Bandit shotguns and makes deliberate critical hits far more practical. It is a poor panic-fire weapon, though, and its slightly smaller magazine and long reload punish sloppy use.
notes: Random world drop. The name is a misspelled play on "Longer Range Killer." Without an accessory or elemental capacitor, it uses the prefix "Huntining." Its closest Scav-style counterpart in Borderlands: The Pre-Sequel is the Straight-Shooter.
